markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and decide on new content strategy bets.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Bofu content is performing well,** with page one rankings and a new goal to increase its click-through rate (CTR) to \>1%.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**A proposed high-volume TOFU play (Data Science/ML) was rejected** for targeting the wrong persona (researchers, not developers), risking traffic that won't convert.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Approved a "churn and burn" TOFU experiment** to quickly publish content on trending Hacker News topics, aiming to capture first-mover advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**A major sign-up flow revamp by EOM Feb** will introduce free plans and remove friction, which is expected to significantly boost conversion rates across all content.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Bofu Optimization

  - [SEO performance is strong, with page one rankings climbing across all clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**Bofu (Tools) Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Performing well; strategy is sound.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase CTR to \>1%.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
          - [Update CTAs on older articles.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
          - [Optimize meta titles.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
          - [Conduct competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

### TOFU Strategy: Data Science/ML Proposal

  - [**Proposal:** A high-volume TOFU cluster on Data Science & Algorithms.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Drive massive traffic via educational content on high-volume, high-consensus topics.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Expected Outcome:** High traffic, low conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Objection (Sylvain):** The persona is wrong (researchers, not developers), creating traffic that won't convert.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Decision:** Reject the proposal. GrowthX will research alternative TOFU clusters targeting the core developer persona (e.g., language-specific content).](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### TOFU Strategy: Hacker News Experiment

  - [**Proposal:** A "churn and burn" experiment for the underperforming "Learn" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Rapidly publish content on trending Hacker News topics.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture first-mover advantage on viral topics (e.g., CloudBot) to dominate search results.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Decision:** Approved. Sylvain noted the infrastructure built for this experiment is reusable.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

### Product & Conversion Updates

  - [**Sign-up Flow Revamp (EOM Feb):**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current flow has high friction (credit card required) and poor conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [**Solution:** A new flow will introduce free plans and remove friction for specific products.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**Impact:** Expected to significantly increase conversion rates from content.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [**Product Launches:**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Intent App:** Early access launched; full GA in \~3 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Context Engine MCP:** Launches next week with a free plan.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [**Context Wiki (/open-source):**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Status:** An existing site with low traffic and poor SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Could be repurposed as an SEO asset (e.g., indexing docs for trending tools) to boost other content.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
      - [**Decision:** GrowthX will analyze the opportunity and present options.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
      - [Research and propose alternative TOFU clusters targeting the developer persona.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [Begin building infrastructure for the Hacker News "churn and burn" experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [Analyze the Context Wiki opportunity and present options.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Share the new marketing plan with GrowthX next week.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Provide launch materials for the Intent App to integrate into Bofu content.](https://fathom.video/share/nFw_TekgfqUTbk6vFkw48Suey3a8nQ9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
